mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_order (order_no, student_id, fix_type, description, status, priority, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{studentId}, #{fixType}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.id as uid, u.account, u.building, u.room FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.student_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT r.*, u.id as uid, u.account, u.building, u.room FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.student_id = u.id WHERE r.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE repair_order SET status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.id as uid, u.account, u.building, u.room FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.student_id = u.id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.id as uid, u.account, u.building, u.room FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.student_id = u.id ORDER BY CASE r.priority WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 WHEN 'low' THEN 3 END, r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.id as uid, u.account, u.building, u.room FROM repair_order r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.student_id = u.id WHERE r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM repair_order GROUP BY status
